title: hub-v3 PR3: migrate hub-v3 command plus version detection and refusal
description: Third PR of the hub v3 migration (.design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md, REQ-9). One-shot conversion: genesis checkpoint on refs/crosslink/checkpoint plus per-agent genesis refs from existing event logs. Old crosslink/hub branch left intact until --finalize. v3 clients refuse v2 hubs with migrate prompt; v2 clients refuse v3 marker ref with upgrade message. Acceptance: AC-6 (full-state diff preservation), AC-7 (cross-version refusal).
